query:
SELECT 
  COUNT(*) as total_docs,
  SUM(CASE WHEN titleEs IS NULL OR titleEs = '' THEN 1 ELSE 0 END) as missing_titleEs,
  SUM(CASE WHEN summary IS NOT NULL AND summary != '' AND (summaryEs IS NULL OR summaryEs = '') THEN 1 ELSE 0 END) as missing_summaryEs,
  SUM(CASE WHEN content IS NOT NULL AND content != '' AND (contentEs IS NULL OR contentEs = '') THEN 1 ELSE 0 END) as missing_contentEs
FROM documents;

  SUM(CASE WHEN titleEs IS NULL OR titleEs = '' THEN 1 ELSE 0 END) as missing_titleEs,
  SUM(CASE WHEN summary IS NOT NULL AND summary != '' AND (summaryEs IS NULL OR summaryEs = '') THEN 1 ELSE 0 END) as missing_summaryEs,
  SUM(CASE WHEN content IS NOT NULL AND content != '' AND (contentEs IS NULL OR contentEs = '') THEN 1 ELSE 0 END) as missing_contentEs
FROM documents;
